description: A satellite map displaying a braided river system in Anatolia, Turkey, captured on 2011-06-30 by SPOT-5 (2.5 m resolution) with a Near Infrared (NIR)/Red/Green (R/G) band combination. The map shows dark blue river channels, indicating water, with a small lighter blue/green feature within one channel, likely a sand or gravel bar. Large, elongated areas of yellow and light green represent sand and gravel deposits of river banks, bars, and floodplains with sparse vegetation, consistent with Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) category 6.2.1.3 "River banks". Surrounding the river system are areas depicted in orange and brown, suggesting artificial surfaces or agricultural land. The imagery source is CNES 2011© Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
